headline: Paramount Skydance shares slide after earnings beat fails to impress on guidance
summary: Paramount Skydance Corp (NASDAQ:PSKY) shares fell nearly 5% on Tuesday morning after the media company reported first-quarter earnings the previous evening, as investors looked past a stronger-than-expected profit result and focused instead on underwhelming forward guidance.
